summary: Width threshold in site-units for 'virtual' push-down of M3 stripe to M2 for M1 pin-access. Value of 0 means all M3 stripes will be pushed-down.
description: Width threshold in site-units for 'virtual' push-down of M3 stripe to M2 for M1 pin-access. Value of 0 means all M3 stripes will be pushed-down.
